prompt: An autonomous rover explores a volcanic terrain. It collects temperature and seismic data every 200 meters and must not approach closer than 5 meters to lava zones. If terrain slope exceeds 30°, it activates stabilizers before proceeding. If a data packet fails transmission three times, it must log the failure and continue. Eventually, all checkpoints must be reached and at least 90% of data successfully transmitted.
constraints: ExploroRover avoids lava zones by ≥ 5 m
ExploroRover logs transmission failure after 3 retries
ExploroRover fails transmission three times, ExploroRover continues.
ExploroRover must eventually reach all checkpoints.
Eventually ≥ 90% data must be successfully transmitted

results.constraint: ExploroRover avoids lava zones by ≥ 5 m

  "confidence": 0.85,
  "pattern_used": "existential_reachability",
  "operator_used": ["E<>"]
}

uppaal_result.explanation: This UPPAAL query checks if there exists a possible execution where the ExploroRover maintains at least a 5-meter distance from lava zones, ensuring it avoids them as required.
